'''鈭歝h-g-f''' ('''kachagaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lol|lol]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lol|lol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-g-f
|-
! Lemma
| kachagaf
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichagaf|thichagaf]] || [[word:jichagaf|jichagaf]] || [[word:shichagaf|shichagaf]] || [[word:kichagaf|kichagaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchagaf|thuthuchagaf]] || [[word:jujuchagaf|jujuchagaf]] || [[word:shushuchagaf|shushuchagaf]] || [[word:kukuchagaf|kukuchagaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchagaf|thuchagaf]] || [[word:juchagaf|juchagaf]] || [[word:shuchagaf|shuchagaf]] || [[word:kuchagaf|kuchagaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchagaf|thuchagaf]] || [[word:juchagaf|juchagaf]] || [[word:shuchagaf|shuchagaf]] || [[word:kuchagaf|kuchagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechagaf|thechagaf]] || [[word:jechagaf|jechagaf]] || [[word:shechagaf|shechagaf]] || [[word:kechagaf|kechagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochagaf|thothochagaf]] || [[word:jojochagaf|jojochagaf]] || [[word:shoshochagaf|shoshochagaf]] || [[word:kokochagaf|kokochagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochagaf|thochagaf]] || [[word:jochagaf|jochagaf]] || [[word:shochagaf|shochagaf]] || [[word:kochagaf|kochagaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochagaf|thochagaf]] || [[word:jochagaf|jochagaf]] || [[word:shochagaf|shochagaf]] || [[word:kochagaf|kochagaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]] || [[word:chagaf|chagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chagaf|th忙chagaf]] || [[word:j忙chagaf|j忙chagaf]] || [[word:sh忙chagaf|sh忙chagaf]] || [[word:k忙chagaf|k忙chagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachagaf|thathachagaf]] || [[word:jajachagaf|jajachagaf]] || [[word:shashachagaf|shashachagaf]] || [[word:kakachagaf|kakachagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachagaf|thachagaf]] || [[word:jachagaf|jachagaf]] || [[word:shachagaf|shachagaf]] || [[word:kachagaf|kachagaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachagaf|thachagaf]] || [[word:jachagaf|jachagaf]] || [[word:shachagaf|shachagaf]] || [[word:kachagaf|kachagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachagaf|shachagaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachagaf|goshachagaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachagaf|gokishachagaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachagafn眉|shachagafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachagafnkn眉|goshachagafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachagafn眉|gokishachagafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachagafsh毛|shachagafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachagafnksh毛|goshachagafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachagafsh毛|gokishachagafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachagafro|shachagafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachagafnkro|goshachagafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachagafro|gokishachagafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachagafmu|shachagafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachagafnkmu|goshachagafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachagafmu|gokishachagafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachagafsher|shachagafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachagafnksher|goshachagafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachagafsher|gokishachagafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachagafng|shachagafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachagafnkng|goshachagafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachagafng|gokishachagafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachagafya|shachagafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachagafnkya|goshachagafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachagafya|gokishachagafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachagafyam|shachagafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachagafnkyam|goshachagafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachagafyam|gokishachagafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachagafn眉sh毛|shachagafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachagafnkn眉sh毛|goshachagafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachagafn眉sh毛|gokishachagafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachagafn眉ro|shachagafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachagafnkn眉ro|goshachagafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachagafn眉ro|gokishachagafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachagafn眉mu|shachagafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachagafnkn眉mu|goshachagafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachagafn眉mu|gokishachagafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachagafsh毛n眉|shachagafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachagafnksh毛n眉|goshachagafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachagafsh毛n眉|gokishachagafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachagafsh毛ro|shachagafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachagafnksh毛ro|goshachagafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachagafsh毛ro|gokishachagafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachagafsh毛mu|shachagafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachagafnksh毛mu|goshachagafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachagafsh毛mu|gokishachagafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachagafron眉|shachagafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachagafnkron眉|goshachagafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachagafron眉|gokishachagafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachagafrosh毛|shachagafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachagafnkrosh毛|goshachagafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachagafrosh毛|gokishachagafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachagafromu|shachagafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachagafnkromu|goshachagafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachagafromu|gokishachagafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachagafmun眉|shachagafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachagafnkmun眉|goshachagafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachagafmun眉|gokishachagafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachagafmush毛|shachagafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachagafnkmush毛|goshachagafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachagafmush毛|gokishachagafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachagafmuro|shachagafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachagafnkmuro|goshachagafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachagafmuro|gokishachagafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
